attacking_style: Late-climb specialist who attacks on final ascents to hold narrow margins. Prefers solo moves in final kilometers rather than long-range efforts, relying on sustained power to the line.
team_tactics: Functions both as protected rider and domestique depending on team needs. When leading, receives minimal direct support and often isolated in finals. Has executed lead-out work for sprinters.
terrain_preference: Punchy uphill finishes and late-race climbing where sustained power under fatigue is decisive. Struggles in pure sprint situations and exposed when team tactics neutralize his moves.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing speed in small group scenarios (5-rider selections). Vulnerable to team tactical situations where multiple riders from opposing squads neutralize attacks. Can lose significant time in GT mountain stages.
key_patterns: Makes final selections but often isolated from teammates in decisive moments (3 observations)
Strong climbing under accumulated fatigue; performs late in stage races (3 observations)
Finishing speed deficit in small sprint situations costs podium positions (2 observations)
Functions tactically as both leader and domestique within same race calendar (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed ability to reach key selections but tactical neutralization and sprint deficit prevented podiums, suggesting plateaued performance level
